headline: The Prague Rooftop Trap
caption:
That stunning Prague rooftop quote? It can hide a curfew that ends your event at midnight.

In the historic centre, noise curfews and tight load-in limits often go unmentioned — until it's too late.

Before you sign, get two things in writing: the exact curfew, and elevator + load-in access. We lock both in the contract early, so the night runs full length.

After 200+ events across 120+ countries, the venue you fall in love with is rarely the one that just works.

Follow Sofia for the details venues won't volunteer. 🎬

#corporateevents #incentivetravel #eventplanner #prague #eventprofs #mice #businesstravel #eventos

headline: The Barcelona Venue Mistake That Strands Your Coaches
caption:
That stunning Barcelona venue you picked? Your coaches may never reach it.

Many central districts are narrow, one-way and restricted — large coaches get stuck, and 200 guests arrive late and frustrated.

The fix: choose the venue by its coach access first, the look second. We lock coach-friendly districts and confirmed drop-offs before anything else.

After 200+ events across 120+ countries, access beats aesthetics every time.

Follow Sofia for the secrets agencies won't tell you. 🎬

#corporateevents #incentivetravel #eventplanner #barcelona #eventprofs #mice #businesstravel #eventos
